_doc: PURPOSE: Stores MCP (Model Context Protocol) server configurations. Shared via git so Claude Code has consistent external tool access in every session — no manual setup required. BENEFIT: GitHub MCP tools (mcp__github__*) are available automatically for the sidkapse/ayurai repository without configuring them each session. EXAMPLE: mcp__github__pull_request_read, mcp__github__add_issue_comment, mcp__github__list_branches all work out-of-the-box. Set GITHUB_TOKEN in your shell environment (export GITHUB_TOKEN=ghp_...).
